name: agent-relay-mcp
description: Public Codex MCP client for AgentRelay.

scripts.check: npm run test:syntax && npm run test:examples
scripts.test:syntax: node --check bin/agent-relay-mcp.mjs && node --check mcp/server.mjs && node --check scripts/doctor.mjs && node --check scripts/protocol-sync.mjs && node --check scripts/install-health-check.mjs && node --check scripts/install-codex-mcp.mjs && node --check scripts/install-local-inbox.mjs && node --check scripts/install-codex-app-inbox-example.mjs && node --check scripts/install-listener-service.mjs && node --check scripts/install-inbox-ui-service.mjs && node --check scripts/listener.mjs && node --check scripts/agentrelay-listener-core.mjs && node --check scripts/agentrelay-local-agent-runner.mjs && node --check scripts/agentrelay-codex-json-prompt.mjs && node --check scripts/agentrelay-task-workspace.mjs && node --check scripts/agentrelay-task-context-sync.mjs && node --check scripts/agentrelay-inbox-intake.mjs && node --check scripts/agentrelay-inbox-ui.mjs && node --check scripts/agentrelay-inbox-processor.mjs && node --check scripts/agentrelay-inbox-agent-executor.mjs && node --check scripts/mcp_smoke_test.mjs && node --check examples/codex-app-inbox/scripts/agentrelay-thread-adapter.mjs && node --check examples/codex-app-inbox/scripts/agentrelay-thread-daemon.mjs && node --check examples/codex-app-inbox/scripts/install-thread-daemon-service.mjs && node --check examples/codex-app-inbox/scripts/smoke-codex-app-inbox.mjs
